name: Scryer's Bloom
text:
This enters exhausted.
Kill this, :rb_energy_1:, :rb_exhaust:: [Predict 2], then draw 1. Gain 1 XP.  (To Predict 2, look at the top two cards of your Main Deck. Recycle any of them and put the rest back in any order.)
